subcodes.first_line: O descendant of the illustrious Dhabih! Thy distinguished grandfather was a sign of guidance and a banner of the Most Exalted Assembly, shedding radiance throughout Kashan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت ذبیح جد بزرگوار ایت هدی بود و رایت ملا اعلی در کاشان نور افشان
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
